description: Slide matching tiles to reach the legendary 2048 block in this highly addictive puzzle game.
instructions: Use your Arrow Keys or WASD to slide all tiles in a direction. When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one!

title: Retro Snake
description: The classic arcade snake game. Grow as long as possible without biting your own tail or crashing.
instructions: Navigate using Arrow Keys. Eat the food to grow, but do not hit the walls or yourself!

title: Hextris
description: An intense, fast-paced fast hexagonal puzzle inspired by Tetris. Match colors to clear lines.
instructions: Left/Right arrow keys rotate the hexagon. Down arrow speeds up block drop. Match three or more blocks of the same color in a line to destroy them.

title: Flappy Bird Classic
description: Tap your way through the narrow gaps between green pipes. Test your timing and reflexes.
instructions: Press Spacebar, click, or tap on mobile devices to flap your wings and gain altitude.

title: Doodle Jumper
description: Bounce upwards on platforms, dodging monsters and void cracks in this endless jumping adventure.
instructions: Use Left and Right arrow keys to move left or right. Bounce on green tiles and shoot upwards.

title: Brutal Tetris
description: The golden standard of puzzle games. Align falling blocks to score lines in a neat, responsive retro block setup.
instructions: Left/Right arrow keys to move. Up arrow rotates the piece. Down arrow is soft drop. Spacebar is hard drop. P pauses the game.

title: JavaScript Retro Racer
description: An outrun-style pseudo-3D retro racing simulation right in your browser. Feel the wind on classic roads.
instructions: Use Left/Right arrow keys to steer, Up arrow to accelerate, and Down arrow to brake.

title: Standard Minesweeper
description: Clear a minefield without detonating a single explosive. Exercise deduction and probability grid analysis.
instructions: Left click a grid cell to reveal it. Right click (or long-press) to flag a cell as a potential bomb. The numbers show adjacent mine counts.
